calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Vehicle Transfer And Jewelry.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for the Trustees. Romulo Fontanilla in propria persona.

Mr. Fontanilla stated that the car was not running, that it was parked at his residence, and that it was the trustee's responsibility to pay for the repairs on the car. Mr. Der stated that the car had been registered as non-operable since the death of the Mother and that Mr. Fontanilla was in possession of all DMV documentation pertaining to the car. In addition, Mr. Der reported that the jewelry issue had been resolved. The Court ordered that $100.00 be deducted from the four beneficiaries distribution. The amount of the $400.00 is to go to Romulo Fontanilla in addition to any other cash assets he is entitled to. Mr. Der is to prepare the order for the First and Final Account which is to include the language regarding the car.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Continued To Jan-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Benjamin Fontanilla and Beatrice Cabonce (Petitioners). Romulo Fontanilla (Beneficiary) in propria persona.

The Court stated that it appeared that most issues except the vehicle and jewelry had been resolved. Mr. Der stated that he had the paperwork for the car, that it required a smog, that he had a temporary permit, that he would provide Romulo Fotanilla with the paperwork today, and that the jewelry was delivered late but he has nine pieces of jewelry for Romulo Fontanilla to come in and look at. Romulo Fontanilla stated that the vehicle has been garaged since 2006, that he wants the car taken to the shop for maintenance and repairs, that the trustees should pay for the repairs, that he has not received his inheritance, that he was seeking documented information about the wedding bands, life insurance policy, and the 2005 taxes. The Court instructed the parties to meet in Mr. Der's office on Wednesday December 17, 2008 at 1:30 p.m. for Romulo Fontanilla to view the jewelry. The Court stated that waivers by three of the five siblings have been filed and that it did not appear to be a complete waiver. Mr. Der stated that three of the siblings do not have an interest in the jewelry; Beatrice does have an interest. The matter was continued to January 26, 2009 for status on the two remaining issues.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for the Trustees of the Fontanilla Trust. Romulo Fontanilla (Beneficiary) in propria persona.

Mr. Der stated that he still had problems with the Department of Motor Vehicles in trying to obtain a duplicate pink slip, and stated that once he gets the pink slip the vehicle can be signed over to Romulo Fontanilla. In addition, he stated the last remaining issue involves nine items of jewelry with an estimated value of $1,800.00. In addition, he stated that Mr. Fontanilla wants the wedding bands which he believes were buried with Romulo Fontanilla's parents. The Court instructed Mr. Fontanilla to go over the nine items of jewelry and decide if he wants anything, then the matter can close. Mr. Fontanilla expressed his concerns regarding the jewelry, not receiving the bank statements, and the lack of communication from Mr. Der. The Court requested that Mr. Der obtain the jewelry from his client so that Mr. Fontanilla could view it. Mr. Der informed the Court that he had previously provided information to Mr. Fontanilla's daughter and that he had delivered the bank statements to Mr. Boessenecker. The Court continued the matter to December 15, 2008.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Continued To Dec-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Continued To Nov-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Continued To Oct-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for Melissa Fontanilla. Ernest Der for Benjamin Fontanilla. Romulo Fontanilla in propria persona.

The Parties presented argument with regard to attorney's fees, the pink slip to the vehicle, the clock, and distribution of jewelry. Mr. Der stated he had not received the duplicate pink slip. Mr. Der will call Mr. Romulo with twenty-four hour notice for Beatrice to look at the clock to determine if she wants it, and set time up a time for pick up with the same twenty-four hour notice. Mr. Fontanilla stated that he would accept the Inventory and Appraisal as true and correct, agreed to allow Mr. Der's client to come to the home to review the property, and objected to Mr. Boessenecker's fees. The Accounting Petition was continued to October 20, 2008, and the issue regarding attorney's fees was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Continued To Sep-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order For Issuance Of Citation For Examination Regarding Property Of The Estate; For Distribution Of Trust Assets And Income; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs.
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Romulo Fontanilla in Pro Per.

No appearance was made by any other party. The Court stated that the parties had complied with the citation, that the next hearing date was set for Septmeber 8, 2008 and that this petition was moot.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Sandra Petritsch CSR#11684. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Order For Issuance Of Citation For Examination Regarding Property Of The Estate; For Distribution Of Trust Assets And Income; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs.
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Continued To Jul-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Romulo Fontanilla in Pro Per. Ernest Der for Benjamin Fontanilla and Beatriz Cabonce (Trustees).

Mr. Der stated that the accounting had been filed and was to be heard on July 21, 2008, and that it included a distribution proposal. The matter was continued to July 21, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

Petition For Order For Issuance Of Citation For Examination Regarding Property Of The Estate; For Distribution Of Trust Assets And Income; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Continued To Jun-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Benjamin Fontanilla and Beatriz Cabonce. Romulo Fontanilla in Pro Per.

Mr. Der requested a continuance stating that the accounting was completed, but that he was waiting for verification from the bank with regard to the deposit. Mr. Romulo stated that he had sent letters to the defendants, that he never got a response to his request and that he needed his inheritance. In addition, he asked the Court to administer the Trust and to distribute the assets. The matter was continued to June 4, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.
